fullText: BREAKING: Artemis II has begun its lunar observation period, during which the crew will observe the Moon up close during its flyby.

fullText: JUST IN: OpenAI projects $121,000,000,000.00 in compute spending in 2028, doesn’t expect profit until “at least” 2030.

fullText: BREAKING: The Artemis II crew is now further from Earth than any humans have traveled in history.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: 𝕏 account of the Iranian Embassy requests that Trump change his Tuesday deadline — "8 P.M. is not that good. Could you change it to between 1 and 2 P.M., or if possible, 1 and 2 A.M.?"

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Iran has allowed a French container ship to cross the Strait of Hormuz while more than 1,000 other ships remain waiting.
